commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=080caf7edab3ee06b7a4e9cd90e89b3fd5be1b41)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes appcast URL construction so a stored `.xml` URL is reused only when its filename matches the requested appcast path, and adds a regression test for prerelease-to-stable feed swapping.

Reproducibility: yes. From current main source, a stored `https://example.com/updates/appcast-prerelease.xml` with a request for `/appcast.xml` returns the stored prerelease URL because line 90 short-circuits on the requested default filename.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs maintainer compatibility direction and contributor real behavior proof rather than an automated repair.

target.title: fix: stop serving the stored prerelease feed to stable appcast clients
target.body:
## What

The appcast proxy can serve stable-channel clients the prerelease feed.

`constructAppcastUrl` short-circuits whenever the requested file is the default `appcast.xml`:

```ts
if (appcastPath === "appcast.xml" || cleanBaseUrl.endsWith(`/${appcastPath}`)) {
  return cleanBaseUrl ...; // use stored URL as-is
}
```

The first disjunct keys on the *requested* filename being the default, not on what the stored file actually is. Storing a full non-default feed URL is a supported configuration (`docs/APPCAST_PROXY.md`, "Direct URLs (With .xml file)"). So if a project stores `https://example.com/updates/appcast-prerelease.xml`, every request for `/appcast.xml` matches `appcastPath === "appcast.xml"` and returns the stored prerelease URL unchanged. Stable users get beta updates.

## Reproduction

Stored `appcast_base_url = https://example.com/updates/appcast-prerelease.xml`, client requests `/appcast.xml`:

- Before: proxy fetches `https://example.com/updates/appcast-prerelease.xml`
- After: proxy fetches `https://example.com/updates/appcast.xml`

## Fix

Key the use-as-is decision on whether the stored filename actually matches the requested one:

```ts
if (cleanBaseUrl.endsWith(`/${appcastPath}`) || cleanBaseUrl === appcastPath) {
```

A mismatch now falls through to the existing filename-replacement branch, so `/appcast.xml` against a stored prerelease URL resolves to `.../appcast.xml`. The existing `.xml`-base cases all store `appcast.xml`, which still matches via `endsWith`, so they are unaffected.

## Tests

Added a case in `tests/api/appcast.test.ts`: stored `.../appcast-prerelease.xml`, request `appcast.xml`, assert the upstream fetch targets `.../appcast.xml`. It fails before the change (fetches the prerelease feed) and passes after. Full appcast suite green (19 passed); `pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` clean.

Found and fixed with the help of the Claude CLI.
target.author: devyrpauli
